prompt:
Anatomical muscle-activation diagram of the "世界最佳拉伸" (world's greatest stretch) exercise, side view, facing right. Person posture: Athletic person at the deepest phase of the world's greatest stretch (low lunge with thoracic rotation): right foot in a deep lunge front position with right knee bent at 90 degrees, foot flat; left leg extended back with knee just above the ground, ball of left foot on the ground; left hand placed on the ground inside the right foot for support; right arm reaching straight up toward the ceiling with the chest opened and rotated to the right; head following the right hand; full-body dynamic stretch combining hip flexor stretch, glute stretch, and thoracic rotation; plain black athletic shorts and gray tank top. Body rendered with semi-transparent skin so underlying muscles are visible. Highlight in saturated red the primary working muscles: hip flexors of the rear leg under stretch and gluteus maximus of the front leg, and thoracic rotators. Highlight in orange the secondary stabilizers: obliques and adductors and shoulder stabilizers. Other muscles in pale neutral gray. Add small clean labels with thin black arrow leader lines pointing from each label to its target muscle group. The labels MUST be in simplified Chinese characters using a clean sans-serif font. Use exactly the following labels: "髂腰肌" pointing to the hip flexors of the rear leg; "臀大肌" pointing to the gluteus maximus of the front leg; "胸椎旋转肌 / 腹斜肌" pointing to the thoracic rotators and obliques. 

CRITICAL CONSTRAINTS — these are non-negotiable:
1. ALL TEXT IN THE IMAGE MUST BE SIMPLIFIED CHINESE CHARACTERS ONLY.
2. ABSOLUTELY NO ENGLISH WORDS, NO LATIN LETTERS, NO PINYIN ANYWHERE IN THE IMAGE.
3. NO romanization or transliteration of muscle names.
4. NO captions, NO subtitles, NO step-by-step text overlays.
5. ONLY the muscle labels listed above should appear as text.

Style: clean medical textbook illustration, off-white background, no facial features (head shape may be shown but no eyes/nose/mouth), anatomically accurate proportions, no shadows on background, no watermarks, no signature.
